TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_alang_Tlangan（alang_Buta）ro_alang_Tpyahan, title = alang_Tlangan（alang_Buta）ro_alang_Tpyahan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/alang_Tlangan（alang_Buta）ro_alang_Tpyahan} }

S.FORM: alang Tlangan (alang Buta) ro alang Tpyahan alang Kmuyow ro alang b'bu Kaykay ga nya maki te iyil bih pu'ing llyung Turu. Kwara alang ta lela ga nya mso'un maki bih utux llyung Klesan, kilgal cinlangan klahang kya ga wa khangan cinlangan na Nipun lela, cinlangan na Kokumito uy, kya ha'iy miman kawas wayal, baley cyoli na Tayal ga knaki bih llyung Klesan kwara, ana ga beta micu wa tbcyan maki bih llyung Mnibuw kruma, kwara alang laga nya si skaki utux llyung ta na. ana ga wa sgayan bih alang b'nux kruma, kki'an lela ga iwan pnhkngyan ta ro pntke'an ta wayal lela la.

alang Tlangan (alang Buta) ro alang Tpyahan alang Kmuyow ro alang b'bu Kaykay ga nya maki te iyil bih pu'ing llyung Turu. Kwara alang ta lela ga nya mso'un maki bih utux llyung Klesan, kilgal cinlangan klahang kya ga wa khangan cinlangan na Nipun lela, cinlangan na Kokumito uy, kya ha'iy miman kawas wayal, baley cyoli na Tayal ga knaki bih llyung Klesan kwara, ana ga beta micu wa tbcyan maki bih llyung Mnibuw kruma, kwara alang laga nya si skaki utux llyung ta na. ana ga wa sgayan bih alang b'nux kruma, kki'an lela ga iwan pnhkngyan ta ro pntke'an ta wayal lela la.
S.PHON: alaŋ tlaŋan (alaŋ βuta) ro alaŋ tpjaħan alaŋ kmujow ro alaŋ βʔβu kajkaj ɣa nja maki te ijil βiħ puʔiŋ lljuŋ turu. kwara alaŋ ta lela ɣa nja ms~ɕoʔun maki βiħ utux lljuŋ kles~ɕan, kilɣal ʦ~ʨinlaŋan klaħaŋ kja ɣa wa kħaŋan ʦ~ʨinlaŋan na nipun lela, ʦ~ʨinlaŋan na kokumito uj, kja ħaʔij miman kawas~ɕ wajal, βalej ʦ~ʨjoli na tajal ɣa knaki βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kwara, ana ɣa βeta miʦ~ʨu wa tβʦ~ʨjan maki βiħ lljuŋ mniβuw kruma, kwara alaŋ laɣa nja s~ɕi s~ɕkaki utux lljuŋ ta na. ana ɣa wa s~ɕɣajan βiħ alaŋ βʔnux kruma, kkiʔan lela ɣa iwan pnħkŋjan ta ro pntkeʔan ta wajal lela la.
